channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Andy Burnham becomes the 7th British prime minister in a dec…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Andy Burnham becomes the 7th British prime minister in a decade after being formally appointed by by King Charles III.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham becomes the 7th British prime minister in a decade after being formally appointed by by King Charles III.

item.title: Strikes carried out by Iran last week injured dozens of U.S.…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Strikes carried out by Iran last week injured dozens of U.S. service members and damaged several helicopters, according to U.S. officials. But the Pentagon did not disclose these strikes, nor the casualties and damage they inflicted.
item.content:encoded: Strikes carried out by Iran last week injured dozens of U.S. service members and damaged several helicopters, according to U.S. officials. But the Pentagon did not disclose these strikes, nor the casualties and damage they inflicted.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [50話]サンキューピッチ - 住吉九 | 少年ジャンプ＋ サンキューピッチ 住吉九 <隔週火曜…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[50話]サンキューピッチ - 住吉九 | 少年ジャンプ＋

サンキューピッチ 住吉九 <隔週火曜更新！最新2話無料>6月、神奈川県の高校球児の間で、ある噂が囁かれていた。夜な夜な現れては「3球勝負」を挑む謎の男、「野球部狩り」――。男は驚異的な豪速球を持ち、勝負に負けたことがないという!!　県立横浜霜葩高等学校、野球部キャプテンの小堀は「野球部狩り」が学内にいると推...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[50話]サンキューピッチ - 住吉九 | 少年ジャンプ＋

サンキューピッチ 住吉九 <隔週火曜更新！最新2話無料>6月、神奈川県の高校球児の間で、ある噂が囁かれていた。夜な夜な現れては「3球勝負」を挑む謎の男、「野球部狩り」――。男は驚異的な豪速球を持ち、勝負に負けたことがないという!!　県立横浜霜葩高等学校、野球部キャプテンの小堀は「野球部狩り」が学内にいると推...

item.title: The FDA said laboratory experts re-checked lettuce sample re…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: The FDA said laboratory experts re-checked lettuce sample results from Taylor Farms in an ‌investigation into an outbreak of the cyclospora parasite and concluded the finding should be considered a false positive reut.rs/3T9VnaY
item.content:encoded: The FDA said laboratory experts re-checked lettuce sample results from Taylor Farms in an ‌investigation into an outbreak of the cyclospora parasite and concluded the finding should be considered a false positive reut.rs/3T9VnaY

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー GitHub - loopgain-ai/loopgain: An open-source cost…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
GitHub - loopgain-ai/loopgain: An open-source cost controller for AI agent loops — stops a loop when it's actually converged and rolls back before it degrades, instead of running to a fixed max_iterations cap. Real-time loop-gain (Aβ) bands + best-so-far

An open-source cost controller for
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
GitHub - loopgain-ai/loopgain: An open-source cost controller for AI agent loops — stops a loop when it's actually converged and rolls back before it degrades, instead of running to a fixed max_iterations cap. Real-time loop-gain (Aβ) bands + best-so-far

An open-source cost controller for

item.title: Hazy skies and poor air quality from wildfires in Canada con…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Hazy skies and poor air quality from wildfires in Canada continued to affect parts of the Midwest and Great Lakes region on Monday, while spreading unhealthy air into portions of the Northeast and the Mid-Atlantic.
item.content:encoded: Hazy skies and poor air quality from wildfires in Canada continued to affect parts of the Midwest and Great Lakes region on Monday, while spreading unhealthy air into portions of the Northeast and the Mid-Atlantic.

item.title: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake shook the Andes region of Peru, k…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake shook the Andes region of Peru, killing at least five people, local authorities say on Sunday. More than 20 people were injured, and 300 have been displaced so far.
item.content:encoded: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake shook the Andes region of Peru, killing at least five people, local authorities say on Sunday. More than 20 people were injured, and 300 have been displaced so far.

item.title: #🔖世の中 <独自>辺野古沖事故、同志社国際高が「中立性」調査始める 校長は「全体として偏らず」 同志社国際高校の3…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
<独自>辺野古沖事故、同志社国際高が「中立性」調査始める　校長は「全体として偏らず」

同志社国際高校の3年生に配付された辺野古沖転覆（固）についての説明会の案内（大竹直樹撮影） 沖縄県名護市辺野古沖で船2隻が転覆し同志社国際高（京都府）2年、武石知華（ともか）さん（17）ら2人が死亡した事故で、同校を運営する学校法人が生徒の保護者を対象に同校の教育の中立性に関するアンケートを始めたことが...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
<独自>辺野古沖事故、同志社国際高が「中立性」調査始める　校長は「全体として偏らず」

同志社国際高校の3年生に配付された辺野古沖転覆（固）についての説明会の案内（大竹直樹撮影） 沖縄県名護市辺野古沖で船2隻が転覆し同志社国際高（京都府）2年、武石知華（ともか）さん（17）ら2人が死亡した事故で、同校を運営する学校法人が生徒の保護者を対象に同校の教育の中立性に関するアンケートを始めたことが...

item.title: New U.K. prime minister Andy Burnham rose to prominence as t…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New U.K. prime minister Andy Burnham rose to prominence as the mayor of Greater Manchester. NBC News traveled there and spoke to those who know Burnham to get a sense of who he really is and what his policies might be.
item.content:encoded: New U.K. prime minister Andy Burnham rose to prominence as the mayor of Greater Manchester. NBC News traveled there and spoke to those who know Burnham to get a sense of who he really is and what his policies might be.

item.title: "Before this World Cup began, I kept thinking one thing over…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description:
"Before this World Cup began, I kept thinking one thing over and over as the tournament grew closer: 'This could be a disaster,'" writes CNN's Kyle Feldscher.

"I couldn't have been more wrong." https://cnn.it/45cb5VH
item.content:encoded:
"Before this World Cup began, I kept thinking one thing over and over as the tournament grew closer: 'This could be a disaster,'" writes CNN's Kyle Feldscher.

"I couldn't have been more wrong." https://cnn.it/45cb5VH

item.title: The European Union recommended that member states delay by t…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The European Union recommended that member states delay by three years penalties on energy importers that fail to comply with the bloc’s controversial methane emissions rules.
item.content:encoded: The European Union recommended that member states delay by three years penalties on energy importers that fail to comply with the bloc’s controversial methane emissions rules.

item.title: Breaking News: A man was arrested after the police said he s…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: A man was arrested after the police said he set a fire and waved a gun outside a federal building in Manhattan that houses immigration courts. The building, 26 Federal Plaza, houses the New York field office of ICE. nyti.ms/4fkjviw
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: A man was arrested after the police said he set a fire and waved a gun outside a federal building in Manhattan that houses immigration courts. The building, 26 Federal Plaza, houses the New York field office of ICE. nyti.ms/4fkjviw

item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)

item.title: AMC's stock jumps 14%+ after reporting Q2 revenue up 14% YoY…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
AMC's stock jumps 14%+ after reporting Q2 revenue up 14% YoY to $1.6B, driven by a box office rebound and its highest quarterly revenue in its 106-year history (Lucas Manfredi/The Wrap)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
AMC's stock jumps 14%+ after reporting Q2 revenue up 14% YoY to $1.6B, driven by a box office rebound and its highest quarterly revenue in its 106-year history (Lucas Manfredi/The Wrap)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: A slow-moving storm system lumbering across the northern Gul…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A slow-moving storm system lumbering across the northern Gulf of Mexico is threatening to bring as much as 6 inches of rain this week, prompting officials to warn of flash flooding from Florida to Texas.
item.content:encoded: A slow-moving storm system lumbering across the northern Gulf of Mexico is threatening to bring as much as 6 inches of rain this week, prompting officials to warn of flash flooding from Florida to Texas.

item.title: Newly released body camera footage shows a police officer re…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Newly released body camera footage shows a police officer rescuing a driver from a burning car in Southlake, Texas, on June 7. CNN has reached out to the Southlake Department of Public Safety for more information.
item.content:encoded: Newly released body camera footage shows a police officer rescuing a driver from a burning car in Southlake, Texas, on June 7. CNN has reached out to the Southlake Department of Public Safety for more information.
